suggestions.reason: MDX files should use curly brace comments instead of HTML comments to avoid potential rendering issues or leakage.

rationale: Candidate 3b4325a26167e9e485e6caac229d9304a40303ab is selected because it provides a natural and technically accurate translation while maintaining the frontmatter structure and MDX requirements. It correctly handles the relative paths for images (../). Compared to the other candidate, it uses more standard Arabic technical terminology (e.g., 'أمرّي مقابل عودي' for 'Imperative vs Recursive'). It also preserves the draft/publish status from the source. One minor suggestion is made to convert the HTML comment to an MDX comment for better consistency with the format.

suggestionLog.reason: MDX files should use curly brace comments instead of HTML comments to avoid potential rendering issues or leakage.
suggestionLog.note: Exact match not found in selected MDX.
